## Why It Works

People want to hear that they don't have to be some Elon Musk or Jeff Bezos to succeed as entrepreneurs. The post dispels that myth up front and then gives them the real 'secret sauce' — confidence and action.

## Template

Most successful [TYPE OF PERSON] I know:
- [OPPOSITE THAN WHAT YOU THINK 1]
- [OPPOSITE THAN WHAT YOU THINK 2]
- [OPPOSITE THAN WHAT YOU THINK 3]

They are just regular ol' people with a [REAL TRAIT 1] and a [REAL TRAIT 2].

If you [MINDSET]?
And you [ACTION]?
You can do it, too.

Take one small step today.
Start here:
[LINK]
